title: Legacy Block Highlight
description: A highly customizable mod that allows the player to modify the block selection outline.
body:
# Legacy Block Highlight
A highly customizable mod allowing the player to modify the block selection outline.

Built for Legacy Fabric 1.8.9

## Latest Version: 1.0.0
1. First release!

## Features
This mod implements the following features:
1. Pressing H opens the Block Highlight configuration menu, allowing you to change various aspects of the block selection.
2. Custom RGB block outline color, outline opacity, and chroma customization options.
3. Custom RGB selection fill color and fill opacity customization options.
4. Option to highlight specific block faces instead of the full block.
5. And a few more!

## How to build

`gradlew build`

## Permissions
Feel free to use Legacy Block Highlight in any mods or modpacks.
